commit.message:
Add personal best tracking with confetti animation

Backend:
- /api/submit now returns is_new_pb (bool) and prev_best, computed by
  combining COUNT+MAX into a single pre-insert query (no schema change)

Frontend:
- PB badge on each unlocked scene card (⭐ PB: 87%) using best_scores
  from userProgress, updates on every renderCards() call
- #pbBanner inside score panel — shows "⭐ New Personal Best!" when
  is_new_pb is true, gold animated pill with scale-in keyframe
- showPBBlast() — 70-piece CSS confetti burst + large gold text overlay,
  auto-removes after 3.2s; fires alongside the score panel banner
- Personal Bests section in My Progress modal: scenes sorted by best
  score descending, shows ↑ arrow when latest attempt beats previous one

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: mirror-app
repository.description: English learning app through movie scenes

commit.message:
Add friend challenge system

Backend:
- challenges table (challenge_id, challenger_username, scene_id, score_to_beat)
- POST /api/challenge — creates a challenge link, returns short hex ID + URL
- GET /api/challenge/{id} — returns challenge details (public, no auth)
- GET /challenge/{id} — SPA route: serves index.html so JS handles routing

Frontend:
- URL routing in boot: detects /challenge/[id] path, loads challenge screen
- #challengeScreen — full-page challenge card showing challenger, score, movie
- "Accept Challenge" button opens scene modal with challengeCtx set
- After scoring: showChallengeResult() shows YOU WON / So close overlay
- "⚔ Challenge a Friend" button in score panel → POST to create challenge
- Share panel: copy link + WhatsApp share button
- Login/register from challenge page flows back into challenge after auth

feat(osric): implement parrying action (§1.6.2.9)

Parrying lets a character forgo their attack for the round to subtract
their STR-based and weapon-specialisation-based to-hit bonuses from
opponent melee attack rolls. Requires a weapon in hand.

- Add Parrying(parry_bonus) parameterised condition to osric_conditions
- Add parry_bonus derive and Parry action to osric_combat
- Wire ParryAction resolution in osric_initiative resolve_action
- Add 5 integration tests covering bonus computation and combat effect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(v1.1): add anti-domain hard veto to delegation scoring (#10)

Introduces `anti_domains` as an optional field on the Stakeholder
interface. If any keyword in the list matches the task text,
the stakeholder is unconditionally excluded from delegation
candidates (score set to -Infinity), regardless of domain match
or relationship weight.

`matched_domains` is still populated on vetoed candidates so
future tooling (e.g. /memory) can surface "vetoed despite
matching X" for debugging visibility.

- scripts/delegate-core.ts: new `anti_domains?: string[]` field +
  veto logic in `scoreDelegate()` (applied after all scoring)
- tests/delegation.test.ts: 4 new tests (TEST-ANTI-001–004)
  covering veto fires, matched_domains preserved, no-veto pass-
  through, and exclusion from runMatch results (189 tests passing)
- integrations/config/stakeholders.yaml.example: field docs +
  vendor example with anti_domains

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: claude-failover v1.0.0 — Anthropic API proxy with key rotation, model fallback, and web dashboard

Complete implementation of a standalone npm-installable proxy that sits between
any Anthropic API client and api.anthropic.com, providing:

- CLI (bin/cli.js): start, stop, status, add-key, remove-key, list-keys, setup, logs, health
- Proxy engine: transparent proxying with automatic key rotation on 429/529,
  per-key per-model cooldown tracking, model fallback chains, SSE streaming support
- Web dashboard: dark-themed SPA with real-time metrics, API key management
  (add/remove/drag-to-reorder/test), profiles, fallback config, auto-setup, SSE log viewer
- Config: JSON at ~/.config/claude-failover/ with 0600 permissions and 5s hot-reload
- Daemon: background process management with macOS LaunchAgent support
- Auto-setup: one-click configuration for zsh, bash, Claude Code, and Cursor

Zero npm dependencies — pure Node.js.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: claude-failover
repository.description: Anthropic API proxy with automatic key rotation, model fallback, and web dashboard

feat(ia): enriquecer contexto AI con asistencia mensual y KPI histórico

Problemas resueltos:
- 'asistencia' y 'analytics' no tenían collector en _MODULE_COLLECTORS
  → la IA nunca recibía datos de tareo ni KPIs al detectar esos módulos
- KPISnapshot.objects.first() traía el snapshot más ANTIGUO (bug)
  → corregido a order_by('-periodo').first()

Agregado:
- _collect_asistencia_detail: faltas/tardanzas/SS del mes, HE aprobadas
  del mes, top 5 áreas con más faltas
- _collect_analytics_kpis: últimos 3 KPISnapshots (tendencia), alertas
  RRHH activas con severidad
- build_system_prompt: sección ASISTENCIA expandida con datos del mes,
  KPI HISTÓRICO ultimos 3 meses, ALERTAS RRHH
- MODULE_KEYWORDS: 'tardanza', 'ausentismo', 'puntualidad', 'tasa',
  'historico', 'metricas' añadidos a keywords de asistencia/analytics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve redirect loop by setting correct localStorage keys for app

The login/signup pages were setting 'currentAccountId' in localStorage,
but the app reads 'sl_current_account' and 'sl_accounts_v1'. This caused
an infinite redirect loop: login→app→login. Now both auth pages use
ensureAppAccount() to set all required keys. Landing page lazy-load
also checks both keys.

commit.message:
Add image gallery with categories; fix thumbnails and CORS

Thumbnails were broken because the old code guessed at Wikimedia hash
paths (e.g. /e/ea/filename) and some were wrong. Also lazy-loading
suppressed thumbnails that were initially off-screen.

Fixes:
- Switch all URLs to the Wikimedia Special:Redirect/file API
  (https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Redirect/file/NAME&width=W)
  which only needs the filename, not the hash path.
- Load full images via fetch() + createObjectURL() so the canvas
  receives a same-origin blob URL rather than a cross-origin one.
  This reliably avoids canvas tainting regardless of redirects.
- Remove img.loading=lazy on thumbnails so they load immediately.
- Add onerror placeholder so broken thumbnails degrade gracefully.

New features:
- Four category tabs: Art, NASA, Dogs & Cats, Flowers
- 21 preset images total with verified Wikimedia filenames:
  Art (6): Starry Night, Great Wave, Sunflowers, Water Lilies,
           The Kiss, Pearl Earring
  NASA (4): Blue Marble, Earthrise, Pillars of Creation, Saturn
  Dogs & Cats (6): Yellow Lab, Beagle Pup, Golden Retriever,
                   Orange Tabby, Cat on Snow, Blue-Eyed Tabby
  Flowers (5): Sunflower, Red Rose, Cherry Blossoms, Irises, Lotus

  always moves to the city even if goTo is aborted or slow

commit.message:
fix(dashboard): ingest rate stat panel — remove inverted orange threshold, neutral color mode

Threshold was green < 0.001, orange >= 0.001 — backwards, coloring the panel
orange whenever traffic was actually flowing. Ingest rate is informational
throughput; health state is covered by the Pipeline Status boolean panel.
Now single green step with colorMode=none for neutral white display.

commit.message:
feat(plugin): save conversation name prompt and newest-first ordering (#303)

* feat(plugin): save conversation name prompt and newest-first ordering

- When clicking the star (save) button on an unsaved conversation, show
  a modal prompting for a name pre-filled with the default
  (conversationTitle or conversationID). Pressing Enter or clicking Save
  confirms. Unsaving skips the modal and proceeds immediately.

- Unsave toast changed to alertWarning (yellow) since it is a removal,
  not a success action.

- Move modal width and input padding into getStyles to avoid per-render
  Emotion class generation. Add placeholder showing the fallback name
  when the user clears the input.

- Reverse the saved conversations list in GenerationPicker so the
  newest saved conversations appear first (client-side, first 50 items).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(plugin): pass undefined for blank save name to activate fallback

Empty string does not trigger the nullish coalescing fallback in
toggleSave. Use `|| undefined` so a cleared input falls back to
conversationName ?? conversationID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
